name: Case B — Risky Fit Fresh CV
summary: AI quality operations specialist with grounded experience building chatbot evaluation workflows, GPT scoring review loops, A/B attribution logic, governance routing, and production AI chatbot operating controls. Positioned for evaluation-operations roles rather than unsupported ML research or framework-heavy scientist ownership.
content:
# Li Ting Kao / Christine Kao

Li Ting Kao / Christine Kao
Target: AI Evaluation Operations Specialist
Taipei

## Summary

AI quality operations specialist with grounded experience building chatbot evaluation workflows, GPT scoring review loops, A/B attribution logic, governance routing, and production AI chatbot operating controls. Positioned for evaluation-operations roles rather than unsupported ML research or framework-heavy scientist ownership.

## Skills

AI Quality Operations: LLM evaluation workflow, GPT scoring workflow, chatbot quality review, A/B testing design, human review loop, Power BI, Azure Data Explorer, Power Automate, Python/SQL troubleshooting, governance routing

## Work Experience

Business Process Engineer / IS BA | Trend Micro | 2021 - 2026
Section: Chatbot Evaluation and Quality Operations
- Created a multi-method chatbot evaluation framework combining benchmark-style question sets, transcript review, GPT-assisted scoring, human follow-up, and live metric comparison.
- Built an automated GPT evaluation workflow for an internal AI assistant quality process, using Azure AI Studio, GPT model prompts, FastAPI handoff, and Power Automate orchestration.
- Defined live A/B routing, identifier, and reporting logic so chatbot quality comparisons could be tied to measurable routing and attribution rules.
Section: Governance and Production AI Support
- Owned customer-service AI chatbot operations across Global and Japan markets, coordinating knowledge-base sync, routing, analytics, and stakeholder follow-up.
- Implemented privacy and AI risk classification logic with automated routing so governance reviewers could triage requests through a structured process.
- Reviewed and troubleshot existing Python, SQL, Jenkins, and API automation logic as maintenance and validation work, without claiming from-scratch engineering ownership.

Data Engineer & Tableau Dashboard Development Sales Specialist | Advanced Communication Technology & Solutions Corporation | 2016 - 2020
Section: Analytics and Delivery Support
- Supported dashboard and data-delivery work that strengthened later AI quality reporting and operational analytics practices.
- Translated stakeholder needs into documentation and technical delivery handoffs for cross-functional project teams.

## Education

AI/Big Data Analysis | TibaMe | 2020/02 - 2020/08

Master of Biomedical Sciences | Chang Gung University | 2009/07 - 2011/08

## Languages

Chinese | Native
English | Professional

gaps: No supported PyTorch, JAX, or TensorFlow experience

Python evaluation pipeline ownership is only partially supported
No CI/CD evaluation quality gate ownership
Language requirement is not fully evidenced

Positioned for evaluation-operations roles rather than unsupported ML research or framework-heavy scientist ownership.

bullets.text: Created a multi-method chatbot evaluation framework combining benchmark-style question sets, transcript review, GPT-assisted scoring, human follow-up, and live metric comparison.
Built an automated GPT evaluation workflow for an internal AI assistant quality process, using Azure AI Studio, GPT model prompts, FastAPI handoff, and Power Automate orchestration.
Defined live A/B routing, identifier, and reporting logic so chatbot quality comparisons could be tied to measurable routing and attribution rules.
Owned customer-service AI chatbot operations across Global and Japan markets, coordinating knowledge-base sync, routing, analytics, and stakeholder follow-up.
Implemented privacy and AI risk classification logic with automated routing so governance reviewers could triage requests through a structured process.
Reviewed and troubleshot existing Python, SQL, Jenkins, and API automation logic as maintenance and validation work, without claiming from-scratch engineering ownership.

workExperience.role: Data Engineer & Tableau Dashboard Development Sales Specialist

bullets.text: Supported dashboard and data-delivery work that strengthened later AI quality reporting and operational analytics practices.
Translated stakeholder needs into documentation and technical delivery handoffs for cross-functional project teams.

transferableStrengths.strength: AI quality evaluation operations for enterprise chatbot and internal AI assistant workflows.
Built practical GPT/chatbot evaluation workflows combining scoring, human review, and metric tracking.
Built GPT-based evaluation workflow and inspected existing Python/SQL-style automation logic for validation and troubleshooting.
Defined chatbot quality metrics, GPT scoring categories, human review loop, and A/B reporting measures.
Translated AI/privacy governance requirements into executable risk scoring, routing, and reviewer controls.
Master of Biomedical Sciences plus AI/Big Data training and scientific research operations background.
Cross-region Global/Japan AI chatbot operations and Philippines Workday KT facilitation.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Deep knowledge of benchmark design, LLM-as-Judge, quantitative quality measurement, and hallucination detection
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: No direct evidence of LLM-as-Judge calibration, hallucination detection methodology, construct validity, or contamination detection.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Structured benchmark-style chatbot evaluation and GPT-based scoring workflow.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Statistics and experimental design including hypothesis testing, A/B testing, confidence intervals, and effect sizes
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Evidence does not prove hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, effect sizes, or statistical significance analysis.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Designed live A/B routing and reporting logic for chatbot comparison.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Practical experience with PyTorch, JAX, or TensorFlow
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: No supported evidence for PyTorch, JAX, or TensorFlow.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Keep this as a gap or transferable angle; do not claim direct ownership.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Multi-turn, tool-use, long-context, or AI-agent evaluation harnesses
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: No direct evidence of multi-agent, long-context, or tool-use evaluation harness implementation.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: AI assistant and chatbot quality evaluation workflow experience.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: CI/CD quality gates and scalable automated evaluation infrastructure
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: No direct evidence of CI/CD quality gate ownership or scalable ML evaluation infrastructure.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Automated quality workflow and production data-pipeline validation support.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: No supported PyTorch, JAX, or TensorFlow experience
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Do not list these tools. If applying, complete and document a small LLM evaluation notebook using one framework or state no direct framework experience in interview.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Do not list these tools. If applying, complete and document a small LLM evaluation notebook using one framework or state no direct framework experience in interview.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Limited proof of advanced statistics: hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, effect sizes, significance testing
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: CV should only claim A/B routing and metric definition. Prepare an interview explanation of what was measured and avoid claiming statistical inference unless documented.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: CV should only claim A/B routing and metric definition. Prepare an interview explanation of what was measured and avoid claiming statistical inference unless documented.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: No direct reward modeling, RLHF, DPO, proper scoring rules, IRT, construct validity, or contamination detection evidence
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Do not include these as skills. Treat them as learning gaps and ask whether the role can accept AI quality operations background.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Do not include these as skills. Treat them as learning gaps and ask whether the role can accept AI quality operations background.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Python evaluation pipeline ownership is only partially supported
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Frame Python as existing pipeline inspection, validation, and troubleshooting unless source confirms from-scratch pipeline code ownership.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Frame Python as existing pipeline inspection, validation, and troubleshooting unless source confirms from-scratch pipeline code ownership.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: No CI/CD evaluation quality gate ownership
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Use production monitoring and automated GPT evaluation workflow language, not CI/CD gate ownership.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Use production monitoring and automated GPT evaluation workflow language, not CI/CD gate ownership.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Language requirement is not fully evidenced
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: State only verified business communication languages and avoid claiming fluent Japanese.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: State only verified business communication languages and avoid claiming fluent Japanese.

recommendedPositioning.headline: AI Quality Operations / Conversational AI Evaluation Specialist with enterprise chatbot evaluation, GPT scoring, A/B testing, and governance automation experience.
recommendedPositioning.summaryAngle: Stretch application. The CV should not try to look like a pure AI Evaluation Scientist. The strongest safe angle is enterprise AI quality operations: chatbot evaluation framework, GPT scoring workflow, A/B attribution metrics, production AI chatbot operations, and AI governance controls. Major ML/statistics/framework gaps must remain visible internally so the CV generator does not overclaim.
wordingGuidance: Enterprise AI quality operations specialist with chatbot evaluation, GPT scoring workflow, A/B testing design, human-review QA loop, and governance automation experience.
Use adjacent-fit wording and explain weak evidence as risk.
Strengthen wording only when supported by selected evidence.
Preserve unsupported requirements as gaps or risks, not visible strengths.

remainingHiringRisks.risk: Deep knowledge of benchmark design, LLM-as-Judge, quantitative quality measurement, and hallucination detection
remainingHiringRisks.impactOnInterviewProbability: May reduce interview probability unless the CV keeps wording conservative.
remainingHiringRisks.mitigation: No direct evidence of LLM-as-Judge calibration, hallucination detection methodology, construct validity, or contamination detection.

remainingHiringRisks.risk: Statistics and experimental design including hypothesis testing, A/B testing, confidence intervals, and effect sizes
remainingHiringRisks.impactOnInterviewProbability: May reduce interview probability unless the CV keeps wording conservative.
remainingHiringRisks.mitigation: Evidence does not prove hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, effect sizes, or statistical significance analysis.

remainingHiringRisks.risk: Practical experience with PyTorch, JAX, or TensorFlow
remainingHiringRisks.impactOnInterviewProbability: Materially reduces interview probability unless new evidence is added or the target angle changes.
remainingHiringRisks.mitigation: No supported evidence for PyTorch, JAX, or TensorFlow.

remainingHiringRisks.risk: Multi-turn, tool-use, long-context, or AI-agent evaluation harnesses
remainingHiringRisks.impactOnInterviewProbability: May reduce interview probability unless the CV keeps wording conservative.
remainingHiringRisks.mitigation: No direct evidence of multi-agent, long-context, or tool-use evaluation harness implementation.

remainingHiringRisks.risk: CI/CD quality gates and scalable automated evaluation infrastructure
remainingHiringRisks.impactOnInterviewProbability: May reduce interview probability unless the CV keeps wording conservative.
remainingHiringRisks.mitigation: No direct evidence of CI/CD quality gate ownership or scalable ML evaluation infrastructure.

remainingHiringRisks.risk: Explain the statistical design behind your A/B testing work, including significance, confidence intervals, and effect sizes
remainingHiringRisks.impactOnInterviewProbability: May reduce interview probability if the recruiter or hiring manager requires direct proof.
remainingHiringRisks.mitigation: Prepare truthful interview evidence or choose a more adjacent target angle.

remainingHiringRisks.risk: How did you calibrate GPT scoring against human judgment?
remainingHiringRisks.impactOnInterviewProbability: May reduce interview probability if the recruiter or hiring manager requires direct proof.
remainingHiringRisks.mitigation: Prepare truthful interview evidence or choose a more adjacent target angle.

remainingHiringRisks.risk: What benchmark design principles did you use beyond a question set?
remainingHiringRisks.impactOnInterviewProbability: May reduce interview probability if the recruiter or hiring manager requires direct proof.
remainingHiringRisks.mitigation: Prepare truthful interview evidence or choose a more adjacent target angle.

remainingHiringRisks.risk: What Python code did you personally build versus inspect or coordinate?
remainingHiringRisks.impactOnInterviewProbability: May reduce interview probability if the recruiter or hiring manager requires direct proof.
remainingHiringRisks.mitigation: Prepare truthful interview evidence or choose a more adjacent target angle.

remainingHiringRisks.risk: Have you used PyTorch, JAX, or TensorFlow in practical evaluation work?
remainingHiringRisks.impactOnInterviewProbability: May reduce interview probability if the recruiter or hiring manager requires direct proof.
remainingHiringRisks.mitigation: Prepare truthful interview evidence or choose a more adjacent target angle.

keywordPlacementNotes: Evaluation workflow, GPT scoring, A/B testing, human review, and governance are visible; ML research, reward modeling, RLHF/DPO, and framework ownership are intentionally omitted.

interviewNotes.details: Evidence is strongest for evaluation operations and practical quality workflows, not PyTorch/JAX/TensorFlow research ownership.

reviewNotes: Generated fresh for ADR-004-W1 acceptance run; conservative adjacent-fit wording used.
